title: Tetris MC
description: Adds tetris as an onscreen minigames to play while you're bored in Minecraft
body:
Adds a **tetris minigame** client side to the Title screen and Game menu screen.
If you're ever bored you can play the fun tetris with **cool graphics** and **effects**!

_Uses random block textures_
      
![tetris game with the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3HcfBzqs/images/1937e50a9b8b27a719ccfb35c1359b9990e18d57.png)

How high can your score get?
